text: When I stand in the bright corridor and peek inside the glass-walled room, I feel like a wandering observer on the edge of purposeful activity—a witness to the quiet hum of collaboration and research behind transparent barriers. Entering the R+D space, surrounded by thoughtful words and curated displays, I sense the gentle tension between sterile formality and the hopeful optimism of innovation. It stirs a philosophical curiosity in me: how do we nurture growth and meaning—literal and figurative—in spaces shaped by both bureaucracy and imagination? Here, I am gently reminded that every institution, no matter how sterile its walls, harbors small seeds of creativity and connection.
